modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty incorporating a template in Microsoft Word.

full_description_text:  
The user is attempting to incorporate a template in Microsoft Word. They are unsure of the steps required to successfully integrate the template into their document. This issue arises during the process of trying to utilize a pre-designed format for their work. The user seeks clarity on how to proceed with this specific task in the Word application.
short_description: Difficulty incorporating a template in Microsoft Word.
